title: Unpinned npm package version requires review

origin.description: Contract seed: a server run via `npx -y some-mcp-server@latest` (no pinned version). Replace with a redacted real-world snapshot before R2 final acceptance.

humanExpectation.rationale: An unpinned package resolves to whatever the registry serves at run time, so the audited code and the executed code can differ; this warrants review before autonomous use.
knownLimitations: Offline static analysis reads the version spec only; it does not fetch the registry to compare the current published version.
